zh.lifeSummary: 當Alswn Malephant於大約1430年出生在威爾士布洛可爾可設斯頓時，她的父親Henry Malephant11428歲，母親Alice ferch Stephen Perrot11428歲。她於大約1446年與Owen Glendower Lord of Glyndyvrdwy, Glyndwr在英國威爾斯丹比爾利安桑福萊德 格藍 康維結婚。

nameMeanings.name: Malephant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Welsh, English: nickname from Old French mal enfant ‘bad child’; compare Bonifant .

variants.name: Bonifant
meanings: English: nickname from a Middle English borrowing of Old French bon enfant ‘good child’. Compare Goodchild .

en.lifeSummary: When Alswn Malephant was born about 1430, in Cosheston, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, Henry Malephant, was 11428 and her mother, Alice ferch Stephen Perrot, was 11428. She married Owen Glendower Lord of Glyndyvrdwy, Glyndwr about 1446, in Llansanffraid Glan Conwy, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Owen Glendower Lord of Glyndyvrdwy, Glyndwr environ 1446, à Llansanffraid Glan Conwy, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alswn Malephant(이)가 대략 1430년 웨일스 p브로케실르 코셰스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Malephant(은)는 11428세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice ferch Stephen Perrot(은)는 11428세였다. 그녀는 대략 1446년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랜산프레이드 글런 콘w이에서 Owen Glendower Lord of Glyndyvrdwy, Glyndwr(와)과 결혼했다.

ru.Llansantffraid Glan Conway, , Clwyd, Wal: ллансанффреид глан конви, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alswn Malephant родилась около 1430 г. в местности кошестон, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Henry Malephant было 11428 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice ferch Stephen Perrot, 11428. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Owen Glendower Lord of Glyndyvrdwy, Glyndwr около 1446 г. в местности ллансанффреид глан конви, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания.
